stemHtml: According to AIR OPS on an IFR flight a commander shall not commence take-off unless the expected weather conditions at the destination and/or required alternate aerodrome(s) are at or above…

options.a: the planning minima, at the estimated time of arrival.
options.b: the planning minima, during a period from 1 hour before to 1 hour after the estimated time of arrival at the aerodrome.
options.c: the aerodrome operating minima, at the estimated time of arrival, and for a reasonable period before and after such a predicted time.
options.d: the aerodrome operating minima, during a period from 1 hour before to 1 hour after the estimated time of arrival at the aerodrome.
